_readme: Phone-calibrated operating point. Deploy: cp configs/calibration.json $PIKSIGN_CKPT/calibration.json (the CLI reads it from there; only 'thresholds' and 'provenance_threshold' are consumed, every other key is documentation).
_fitted: 2026-07-15, per-branch 98th percentile (2% FPR/branch) of 39 real phone photos, on the modern-retrained experts (val bacc: a1_sd21 0.952, a2_flux_gentle 0.980, a4_gpt4o 0.982; a3_nanobanana 0.961 from the original run). vlm rounded up from 0.507 so the max-scoring calibration real sits strictly below.

_verified.ai_edit_fakes_caught: 8/10 (mytest_norm; the 2 misses sit inside the real/fake score overlap)
_verified.heldout_modern_reals: 365 reals never seen in fitting: each branch fires at 1.6-2.2%, matching the 2% design
